message:
chore: document ast-grep fixes, jsonl output, and version flag

- explain ast-grep root cause: unsupported 'critical' severities + exit-code>0 handling broke scans
- note rule pack repairs (JS catch/throw/react/cookie) and exit code policy (0/1 success, >1 fail)
- record new CLI UX: --version, --format=jsonl, --beads-jsonl, --suggest-ignore
- note pip-audit/ruff flag fixes and successful UBS CI jsonl run (0 critical/0 warnings)
- mention remaining open follow-ups: optional Beads import helper, Windows validation
